name: viirs_ntl_annual_v22_avg_masked
title: Annual VIIRS Nighttime Lights v2.2 - Average Value
description: Annual VIIRS nighttime lights product Version 2.2. Average value with background pixels masked. Please use in combination with VIIRS Nighttime Light Cloud Free Coverage product to confirm sufficient cloud free measurements are available within your boundary features.
